backend_rationale: No OpenSpec in this project. Single-tool (Claude Code) execution with progress.json bookkeeping. Hybrid not warranted at this scale.

next_action.description: Execute change m5-m7-ua-strings-env-aliases (M5+M7 bundle): outbound User-Agent string flips in copilot.rs + web_search.rs (LibreFang/1.0 → BossFang/1.0, LibreFangAgent/0.1 → BossFangAgent/0.1) and additive BOSSFANG_* env-var aliases for INSTALL_DIR (placed in install.sh, M3), REGISTRY_PUBKEY, REGISTRY_PUBKEY_URL, DASHBOARD_EMBEDDED_ONLY.

phase_progress: 4/7 milestones done (M1, M2, M3, M4). Next: M5+M7 bundle (UA + env aliases).
